title: rottboellia rugosa
intro: Rottboellia rugosa, also known as Coi, is a tropical plant species native to the tropical regions of Asia, Australia, and the Pacific Islands. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Rottboellia rugosa include treating fever, cough, and digestive issues, as well as being used as an antiseptic and to reduce inflammation. Rottboellia rugosa can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used in traditional medicine to harness its medicinal properties.
